title: An Act relative to a certain property in the city of Lowell

abstracts.abstract: By Ms. Howard, a petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 3061) (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Vanna Howard for legislation relative to a certain property in the city of Lowell.  State Administration and Regulatory Oversight.
